header.description: One-row header dataset with scalar parameters and recipe name

rows.description: Detail rows: one row per bin (1-12) with material, set/actual weights, errors

totals.description: Aggregate totals: sum of set/actual weights, sum of errors, computed total error %

semantics: Single-table (recipes) with MELT reshape to unpivot 12 bin columns into rows. Each recipe batch produces 12 detail rows (filtered for non-empty bins). Computed fields for error_kg, error_pct at row level. Totals are sums of row values plus computed total_error_pct. No join required. Optional filters: recipe_name, date range on start_time.
transformations: MELT reshape: unpivot bin1_content through bin12_content into material_name column
MELT reshape: unpivot bin1_sp through bin12_sp into set_wt_kg column
MELT reshape: unpivot bin1_act through bin12_act into act_wt_kg column
Generate bin_number column (1-12) as row_bth_no during melt
Filter reshaped rows to exclude bins where material_name is null or empty
Order rows by bin_number ASC (1-12 sequential)
Format numeric columns: 2 decimals for weights and percentages
